---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(reshape)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(this.path)
library(fs)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())

# regression results
for (stock_base in c("all", "large")){
  
  data <- readRDS(paste0("../../tmp/other_methods/", stock_base, "/fama_macbeth/fm_results_summary.RDS")) %>%
    filter(var == "combined") %>%
    filter(reg_var %in% c("signal", "size", "beta", "size", "bm")) %>%
    mutate(reg_var = ifelse(reg_var == "signal", "CSM", reg_var)) %>%
    select(-var, -model_name) %>%
    mutate(coef = 100 * coef, se = 100 * se)
  
  # order RHS vars
  tmp <- unique(data[, .(reg_var)]) %>%
    mutate(var_idx = row_number())
  data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "reg_var")
  rm(tmp)
  
  # order universe and reg specifications
  tmp <- unique(data[, .(universe, spec_idx)]) %>%
    arrange(universe, spec_idx) %>%
    mutate(reg_idx = row_number())
  data <- merge(data, tmp, by = c("universe", "spec_idx"))
  rm(tmp)
  
  # add stars
  cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
  data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
  data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
  data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
  data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
    ifelse(x > 0,
      paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
      "$"
    )
  })]
  data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
  data[, ss_lab := NULL]
  
  est <- dcast(data, var_idx + reg_var ~ reg_idx, value.var = "coef_lab") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef") %>%
    select(-var_idx)
  est[is.na(est)] <- ""
  
  se <- dcast(data, var_idx + reg_var ~ reg_idx, value.var = "se") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se") %>%
    select(-var_idx) %>%
    dplyr::mutate_at(vars(2:9), ~ paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(., 2)), ")$"))
  se[se == "$(NA)$"] <- ""
  
  tbl <- bind_rows(est, se)
  rm(est, se)
  
  ctrls <- data.table(reg_var = "Industry FE", t(rep(c("N", "N", "Y", "Y"), 2)))
  ctrls <- rbind(ctrls, data.table(reg_var = "Other characteristics", t(rep(c("N", "N", "Y", "Y"), 2))))
  ctrls[, group_id := 1000 + 1:2]
  ctrls[, type := ""]
  names(ctrls) <- names(tbl)
  tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, ctrls)
  rm(ctrls)
  
  obs_and_r2 <- unique(data[, list(reg_idx, obs = n, r2)]) %>%
    mutate(
      obs = comma(obs),
      r2 = paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", r2), "$")
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(., -reg_idx) %>%
    pivot_wider(name, names_from = "reg_idx", values_from = "value") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(name = replace(name, name == "r2", "$R^2$")) %>%
    mutate(name = replace(name, name == "obs", "Obs")) %>%
    dplyr::rename(reg_var = name) %>%
    mutate(group_id = c(2001, 2002), type = "")
  
  tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, obs_and_r2) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
    mutate(reg_var = ifelse(type == "se", "", reg_var)) %>%
    mutate(type = NULL, group_id = NULL)
  
  # add col columns
  col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:8, ")")))))
  names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
  tbl <- bind_rows(col_names, tbl)
  rm(col_names)
  
  align_vactor <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
  x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vactor)
  
  this_add_to_row <- list(
    pos = list(-1, 0, nrow(tbl) - 5, nrow(tbl) - 3, nrow(tbl)),
    command = c(
      "\\hline \\multicolumn{9}{c}{Dependent variable: next-month return ($r_{i,t}$, in \\%)} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-9}",
      "& \\multicolumn{4}{c}{Full sample} & \\multicolumn{4}{c}{Above 20\\% NYSE size} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-5} \\cmidrule(l){6-9}  \\vspace{5pt}",
      rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 2),
      "\\bottomrule"
    )
  )
  
  cat("The stock base is:", stock_base)
  print(x.side,
    type = "latex",
    table.placement = "!ht",
    include.rownames = FALSE,
    include.colnames = FALSE,
    tabular.environment = "tabular",
    caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
    hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
    floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
    sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
    add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  )
  out_dir <- paste0(stock_base, "/")
  dir_create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  print(x.side,
    type = "latex",
    table.placement = "!ht",
    include.rownames = FALSE,
    include.colnames = FALSE,
    tabular.environment = "tabular",
    caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
    hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
    floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
    sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
    add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
    file = paste0(stock_base, "/fm_reg_combined.tex")
   )
}


```
